overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos on a sunny day. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes by skyscrapers, a McDonald's restaurant, billboards, and a construction site while encountering various pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with palm trees and office towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along downtown sidewalk past palm trees and commercial buildings

entered.detail: Skyscraper with green signage near the top, reflective glass facade
Tall palm tree trunk in foreground, iconic LA-style street vegetation
Low-rise commercial structure with awnings and storefronts
Bright yellow fire hydrant on sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit downtown sidewalk lined with palm trees. A tall glass office tower dominates the left side of the frame while commercial buildings line the right. The street is relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto red-paved crosswalk to cross the street
character continues crossing as vehicles pass on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street via crosswalk while heading toward the McDonald's restaurant

notable_agents.action: man in beige shirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: Fast food restaurant with distinctive red roof and golden arches signage
Traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
Yellow diamond-shaped sign with pedestrian symbol

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection on a red-paved crosswalk. A McDonald's restaurant with its iconic red roof and golden arches becomes visible ahead. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction, and traffic lights control the sparse vehicle flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with billboards and fast food

events.description: character reaches opposite sidewalk and continues past the McDonald's

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing the McDonald's and large commercial billboards

entered.detail: Large vertical billboard displaying car advertisements
Glass and metal bus stop shelter with advertising panels
Colorful parking structure with yellow and green facade elements
Large billboard with 'Los Santos' text and city imagery

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk past the McDonald's restaurant, which now falls behind. Large commercial billboards dominate the view, including one advertising cars and another with 'Los Santos' branding. A bus shelter and multi-story parking garage appear on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial street with bus stops

events.description: character passes by a group of pedestrians standing near a bus shelter

agents.ego_description: walking along shaded sidewalk passing pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and shorts standing near storefront

entered.detail: Large mature tree providing shade over the sidewalk
Building with large black and white mural artwork on facade
Red newspaper box on sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a tree-lined sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. Large street trees provide partial shade. The character passes a bus shelter and approaches an area with a building featuring prominent mural artwork. Various pedestrians walk or stand along the storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with construction site and industrial buildings

events.description: character approaches area with active construction site and steel frame building

agents.ego_description: walking past construction site and colorful industrial buildings

entered.detail: Multi-story building under construction with exposed steel beams and blue safety netting
Building with distinctive pink and green colored window panels
Security fence with barbed wire topping along sidewalk
Red tower crane operating at the construction site

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a colorful building with pink and green windows and approaches an active construction site. A steel-framed building under construction dominates the left side, with a tower crane visible. The right side features a chain-link security fence with barbed wire. The area is less dense with fewer pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit downtown district that transitions from a polished corporate corridor into a gritty urban construction zone. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and a towering glass office building, moving forward until the character crosses a red-paved intersection toward a McDonald's restaurant. As the restaurant falls behind, the view shifts toward large commercial billboards and a multi-story parking garage before gliding under the shade of street trees past a building adorned with mural artwork. The scene then opens up as the character passes a colorful building with pink and green windows, finally arriving at an active construction site dominated by a steel-framed structure, a tower crane, and a barbed-wire security fence.
